chunks.text: Course: CS 264 | EECS at UC Berkeley CS 264. Implementation of Programming Languages Catalog Description: Compiler construction. Lexical analysis, syntax analysis. Semantic analysis code generation and optimization. Storage management. Run-time organization. Units: 4 Also Offered As: COMPSCI 264 Related Areas: Programming Systems (PS) Prerequisites: COMPSCI 164; COMPSCI 263 recommended. Formats: Spring: 3.0 hours of lecture, 1.0 hours of discussion, and 6.0 hours of laboratory per week Fall: 3.0 hours of lecture, 1.0 hours of discussion, and 6.0 hours of laboratory per week Grading Basis: Default Letter Grade; P/NP Option Final Exam Status: No Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
